# Update MFC limit in application - from API and landing page

: Saksham Srivastava
Created time: August 2, 2024 12:14 PM
Status: Not started
Last edited: September 3, 2024 4:07 PM

# **What problem are we solving?**

Currently for B2B partners where we allow MFC fetch and RTA pledge:  Once customers checks MFC limit on their platform and logins into the SDK, the limit is not refreshed upon refreshing the limit on partner platfomrs. 

---

# **How do we measure success?**

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

## User stories / User flow

## Requirements

When customer refreshes their limit either through MFC limit check API or on landing page
- Limit refreshed before customer clicks on CTA of the “verify interest and charges”/”loan offer” page (before BE step: KYC_DOCUMENTS), the same should reflect in the fetched portfolio data of the customer. 

When customer refreshes their funds, the same should reflect on LSQ as well (similar to current CAMS/KFin refresh handling)

Note: 

- This check should be done only in case of MFC Fetch and RTA pledge
- We should have the ability to enable the refresh functionality specifically for some partners/platform.
- Initially this will be enabled only for PhonePe and Jupiter.

UAT discussion

- Post a user does CAMS and KFin refresh on the unlock credit limit page, MFC refresh will not update the limit.
- Track with Jupiter
